hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path') && echo "$f" | grep -qE 'public/.*\.(css|js)$' || exit 0 && base=$(basename "$f") && for html in /home/user/leica-configurator/public/*.html; do grep -q "${base}?v=" "$html" || continue; current=$(grep -o "${base}?v=[0-9]*" "$html" | grep -o '[0-9]*$' | head -1); next=$((current + 1)); sed -i "s|${base}?v=${current}|${base}?v=${next}|g" "$html"; done
